children.text: will be in the interest of better service to the public or of economy of operation; and

children.label: b
children.text: The Board may impose conditions governing the pooling or division and may approve and authorize payment of a reasonable consideration between the rail carriers.

children.label: c
children.text: The Board may begin a proceeding under this section on its own initiative or on application.
